title: Among the S&P 500, these 20 companies have made the best use of investors' money
text: There is no easy way to select individual stocks. Measures of financial quality can highlight companies that are worth a closer look, but a decision to commit money must also take into consideration both recent developments and a look ahead.

title: Waters Corporation Announces Business Unit Leadership Transition
text: Jonathan Pratt to Step Down to Pursue an External Opportunity Christos Ross Named Interim Senior Vice President of the Waters Division MILFORD, Mass. , Oct. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Waters Corporation (NYSE:WAT) today announced that Jonathan ("Jon") Pratt has decided to step down from his role as Senior Vice President of the Waters Division, to pursue an external opportunity.

title: Waters Accelerates Oligonucleotide Bioanalysis with the Launch of OligoWorks™ SPE Workflow and Kits
text: News Summary: Delivers up to 2x[i] higher oligonucleotide recovery from biofluids with improved LC-MS sensitivity and reproducibility to support robust quantitation. Faster time-to-results for expanded range of bioanalysis projects enabled through enhanced LC-MS sensitivity, and standardized protocols that reduce method development and sample processing time.

title: Waters Corporation Schedules Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call
text: MILFORD, Mass. , Oct. 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Waters Corporation (NYSE: WAT) will hold its Q3 2023 financial results conference call live on Tuesday, November 7th, 2023 at 8:00 a.m.

title: Waters (WAT) Boosts Mass Spectrometry Clientele With Latest Move
text: Waters (WAT) partners with the University of San Agustin to provide the latter with technology equipment in its newly developed mass spectrometry imaging center in the Philippines.
